activefloat_depth_semantics.interpretation: the 200 m value belongs to an associated engineering model and is not assigned to the material proxy

Figure_1_multisupport_baseline.title: Conditional four-case comparison with unranked ActiveFloat endpoints
Figure_1_multisupport_baseline.caption_short: Four conditional median bars retain 5--95% sampled ranges; ActiveFloat is shown only as two hollow unit endpoints and is unranked.
Figure_1_multisupport_baseline.unit: g CO2e per kWh at common 0.42 capacity factor
Figure_1_multisupport_baseline.filters: ranked bars: monopile, WindCrete sensitivity, TLP and VolturnUS-S; ActiveFloat exclusive 2.55 t and 2550 t rebar endpoints are unranked; turbine, tower, anchors and later stages excluded

Figure_2_rank_stability.title: Reported-material rank stability by included boundary layer
Figure_2_rank_stability.caption_short: Matched four-case matrices use one common 0--1 scale and a one-percent tie band; ActiveFloat is excluded because its rebar unit is unresolved.
Figure_2_rank_stability.unit: reported-material conditional sample fraction (row lower + 0.5 times tie)
Figure_2_rank_stability.filters: monopile, WindCrete sensitivity, TLP and VolturnUS-S only; ActiveFloat excluded; equal-yield material-production proxy; matched core and core-plus-station-keeping panels

Figure_3_inventory_corrections.title: Material identity changes the inferred burden
Figure_3_inventory_corrections.caption_short: Legacy and source-corrected material mappings for VolturnUS-S and WindCrete.
